go_no_go.note: The retired pre-PT-RT1.4 runtime produced 15m opens after cutover and is excluded from active scoring; the restarted active runtime has zero 15m rows.

data_health_summary.lane_expansion_note: One blocking candle or indicator row can expand into one data_unavailable decision per strategy lane. Missing or stale mids are warning-only when closed candles are available.
